etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "tree") with dots (flames) -> firewood sacrifice; 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") added for emphasis; 呂(呂) (lǚ, "spine") as phonetic -> evolving to 日(日) (rì, "sun") in later forms
etymology.interpretation: The character 尞 originated as a visual depiction of sacrifice using trees as firewood, with surrounding flames represented by dots. The addition of 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") emphasized this concept, while 呂(呂) (lǚ, "spine") was incorporated as a phonetic element in some evolved forms to create related characters like 寮. This later influenced the form to include 日(日) (rì, "sun") as a component in later scripts.
